(b) in rule 2, in the Definitions, in clause (a) for "Cost and works Accountants Act, 1949", read "Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959". |F. No. 5^2/2007-CL-V] JITESH KHOSLA, Jt. " ( ? ) , (3), (S),03) 3TK (xrf) "jfrfSTH W" ( ^ ) , W , CT), (*) afk W * i » f I [ m ?L 5/2/2007-^eT-V] CORRIfEMHJM New Delhi, the 22nd March, 2007 G.S.R. 227(10).—In the Notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Company Affairs published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 17th November, 2006, vide G.S.R. 709(E) dated the 17th November, 2006, at pages 4 to 8, in respect of the Company Secretaries (Election Tribunal) Rules, 2006,— (1) at page 4,— (a) in Rule 2, in the Definitions,— (i) for serial numbers "(m), (n), (o). (p), (q) and (r)" read "(a), (b), (c), (d), (e) and (f)"; (ii) in clause (f),for "Tribunal" means the Tribunal formed under sub-section (1) of Section 1 of the Act', read' 'Tribunal" means the Tribunal formed under sub-section (1) of Section 10B of the Act'. (2) at page 5, in sub-rule (3), of rule 3,/w serial numbers "(k), (1), (m), (n) and (o)", read "(a), (b), (c), (d) and (c)". [F.No. 5£/2007-CL-Vl JITESH KHOSLA, Jt. Secy.
